sub_loading: Free live radio · syncs to your device

sub_count.one: Free live radio · {count} station · syncs to your device
sub_count.other: Free live radio · {count} stations · syncs to your device

hint: ▶ play in the browser · ★ set the device default · ✎ edit · ⌃⌄ reorder.
np_idle_hint: Pick a station to start listening
empty_list: No stations yet — add one with ＋.
badge_browser_only_title: https plays in the browser but not on the Cardputer
note_stream: Plain http:// MP3 plays on the Cardputer too. https:// plays here but not on the device.
note_stream_warn: ⚠ https plays in the browser but NOT on the Cardputer (no TLS). Use http:// for device support.
note_np: JSON metadata for the track line — leave empty for a plain live feed.
err_https: ⚠ https stream blocked here — but it will play on the device if it is reachable.
err_unreachable: ⚠ stream unreachable from the browser (it may still work on the device).
info_lead: Free live internet radio for NucleoOS. One station list, shared between this app and the Radio app on your Cardputer.
info_add: Add a station. Tap Add station, give it a name and paste a direct stream URL (an MP3 stream). It joins the list everywhere instantly.
info_star: Set the device default. The starred station is the one your Cardputer tunes the moment you open its Radio app.
info_listen: Listen here. Play any station in the browser. If it serves track info, you'll see the artist, title and a progress bar.
info_reorder: Reorder & edit. Use ⌃⌄ to reorder, ✎ to edit, 🗑 to remove. Every change saves to the device the instant you make it.
info_device_note: Device note: the Cardputer plays plain http:// MP3 streams only — it has no room for HTTPS next to the audio decoder. https:// stations are tagged “browser only”: they play here but won't run on the device. Curated free stations come from SomaFM.
toast_readonly: Open Radio from the device shell to save changes
